blindness_note: Hidden method identity: the evaluator is not shown M1/M3, model, temperature, prompt, source filename, or generation pipeline. Visible directional role: Reference Concept versus Transformation Candidate.

candidate.title: Low-Acid Caffeine Concierge
candidate.target_user: Individuals with caffeine sensitivities
candidate.problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in non-irritating, laboratory-tested gentle preparation methods in cafe environments
candidate.core_concept: Personalized coffee selection based on individual sensitivity to acidity.
candidate.proposed_approach: A subscription service that curates beans known for low-acidity profiles and provides a simple pH test kit for users to track their own reactions.
candidate.prototype_scope: A 10-person pilot using existing low-acid bean varieties and a basic pH strip kit to gather subjective feedback. | Source 3 known low-acid coffee varieties.; Recruit 10 participants with known sensitivities.; Distribute coffee and pH test strips for a 2-week trial.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Use this concept only as the reference point for judging preservation, retention, MVP improvement, overclaim removal, and semantic drift.

candidate.title: High-Efficiency Batch Prep Lockers
candidate.target_user: Early-career shift workers in transit corridors
candidate.problem_or_desire: No time to properly nutritious pre-prepped daily sustenance between rigid shift boundaries
candidate.core_concept: Automated kiosk network stocked by local morning-prep professional chef kitchens
candidate.proposed_approach: Time-sensitive temperature kiosks near train hubs that enable rapid mobile code retrieval of bulk caloric daily prep portions
candidate.prototype_scope: Deployment of three climate controlled modular locker cabinets dispensing pre-prepped heat-or-eat nutritious vegetable pods near a single bus hub

candidate.title: Arboretum Architect
candidate.target_user: Urban professionals feeling disconnected from nature
candidate.problem_or_desire: Lack of calming mental stimulation during public transit commutes
candidate.core_concept: Slow-paced horticultural design where trees grow in real-time synchronization with sunlight exposure in the player's zip code.
candidate.proposed_approach: Integrate local meteorological and astronomical APIs to dictate plant growth patterns, incentivizing small adjustments to virtual plots throughout the day.
candidate.prototype_scope: Single desert garden biome where user can plant one cactus and observe sun-path light-tracking simulations over a 48-hour period.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Assess how this candidate changes, preserves, narrows, or operationalizes the Reference Concept. Do not assume this transformation is automatically better.

candidate.title: Arboretum Architect
candidate.target_user: Urban professionals feeling disconnected from nature
candidate.problem_or_desire: Lack of calming mental stimulation during public transit commutes
candidate.core_concept: Slow-paced, nature-focused horticultural design that evolves based on external environmental data.
candidate.proposed_approach: A slow-paced gardening game where plant growth is simulated based on a pre-defined 'sunlight schedule' that mimics local day/night cycles, allowing users to check in on their virtual garden at their own pace.

candidate.title: Community Moderation Firewall
candidate.target_user: Slack-hosted or Discord-hosted digital service communities

candidate.title: Pantry Potioneer

candidate.title: Pantry Potioneer
candidate.target_user: Home cooks trying to minimize food waste
candidate.problem_or_desire: Managing quickly expiring ingredients that end up in the trash
candidate.core_concept: An RPG fantasy loop where monsters representing hunger levels and potion recipes are dynamically generated based on manual pantry inventory scanning.
candidate.proposed_approach: Camera-vision OCR scanning that maps specific pantry items to equipment traits (e.g., milk is defensive, spice is offensive) to fend off pantry chaos creatures.
candidate.prototype_scope: Inventory scanner integration processing ten basic produce items as offensive ability slots.

candidate.title: Syntax Storm
candidate.target_user: Developers working on clean code focus
candidate.problem_or_desire: High mental fatigue during weekend learning periods
candidate.core_concept: Combat strategy built entirely on cleaning buggy snippets, represented as infected territory grids.
candidate.proposed_approach: Applying real regex principles as combat commands, effectively treating syntax repair as real-time defensive fortification building.
candidate.prototype_scope: One combat grid that rewards valid syntax string repair of two predefined erroneous input segments.
